chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. Appln: No.S-660 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For orders on MA-9188/23 (urgency) For orders on office objection For orders on MA-9189/23 (exemption) For hearing of main case 25.09.2023 Mr. Wahid Bux Aijiz Laghari advocate for applicant. --------- 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Through this application, the applicant has challenged the order dated 10.08.2023 passed by Additional Sessions Judge-II/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Kotri, wherein the prayer of the applicant before Justice of Peace in respect of the protection was allowed and the prayer for registration of FIR was declined. Learned counsel for applicant was asked to show from the contents of the application as to which cognizable offence is made out, he failed to provide proper assistance. However, the paragraph-3 of the application is scanned from where no any cognizable offence is seems to be made out and the grievance whatsoever is to be of non-cognizable and seems to be a frivolous one and by filing present application, the applicant waste the precious time of this Court. In these circumstances, this application being frivolous and not maintainable is dismissed in limine along with pending application(s) with cost of Rs.5000/-(rupees five thousand), which may be deposited by the applicant in the account of dispensary of this Court within fifteen days. In case, the applicant is not deposited the said amount within stipulated time, then the matter should be placed before the Court for further orders. JUDGE g
